scripts.docker:seed: docker exec -it kamus-api uv run python scripts/seed.py
scripts.db:exec: docker exec -it kamus-db psql -U postgres -d kamus
scripts.docker:migration: docker exec -it kamus-api uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.docker:migration:create: docker exec -it kamus-api uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m
